title: stanleya pinnata var. integrifolia
intro: Stanleya pinnata var. integrifolia, also known as prickly phacelia or prickly globe mallow, is a plant species that belongs to the mallow family and is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stanleya pinnata var. integrifolia include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in herbal teas, infusions, and salves, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for therapeutic purposes.
